title: CGC PMS AutoPilot Loop Event
description: Minimal event contract for short, machine-readable loop observations.

loopId.description: Loop identifier that ties related events together.

issueId.description: Ready issue or task identifier referenced by this event.

phase.description: Loop phase active when the event was emitted.

role.description: Role that produced the event summary.

eventType.description: Event category for tracing dispatch and evidence flow.

summary.description: Short human-readable summary without raw logs or secrets.

evidence.description: Minimal evidence references, not full stdout or stderr dumps.

nextAction.description: Immediate next step inferred from this event.
